title: achievement race
description: earn as many achievement points as possible to beat your friends!
body:
## achievement race

every achievement is worth a set amount of points - based on difficulty, speedrunning etc. on game start, 6 achievements are selected to be **2x multiplied** for game variety. the player with the most points after 45 minutes wins!

![achievements!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uescZpbS/images/ef2ab18a44562eea47bc7bd9d6638cef7a900d89.png)

**view the full achievement list & points on [the official achievement list](https://acrace.plexion.dev/list).**
![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/973652851823878274/1058076667018485830/image.png)

#### installation
by using this datapack/mod, your world will be **permanently changed**. for this reason, **do not apply this datapack on an existing world you care for**.

once installed, you will be presented with a "setup flow" in the chat, use this to configure in-game options. once you're ready, hit the start button!
